title: Vue browser regression
task: Fix a Vue settings form that loses selected values after a page refresh.
context: The bug is visible in the browser and needs a repeatable regression check before merge.

route.path: Frontend / Vue / UI > Browser regression > State persistence
route.reason: Start where the rendered bug appears, inspect Vue state, capture a browser regression, and define acceptance coverage.

omitted_skills.reason: The reported symptom is client state loss rather than slow data access.
No backend contract change is currently in scope.
